title: Potion's recipe book/Libro de recetas de pociones
description:
A book with all recipes of potions
Un libro con todas las recetas de pociones
body:
# EN:
Thanks to this datapack you don't need wiki no more, or other sites, to see all the recipes of the potions, you have all in one book in-game.

If you didn't see the video, check out the advancements, there is a little help to how to get the book

## English versions are called "prb"

Tutorial: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jb73rHsTHGk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# ES:
Gracias a este datapack ya no tendrás que recurrir a la wiki, o donde sea, para ver las recetas de cada poción, lo tienes todo en un solo libro.

Si no te viste el video, revisa la pestaña de logros, hay una pequeña ayuda para saber como obtener el libro

## Versiones en español llamadas "lrp"

Tutorial: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/03LkKKabO-M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
